description_long: This is a modern, wall-mounted radiator with a tall, rectangular form and a minimalist design. The main body is a flat, white panel, while the central section features a series of evenly spaced, vertical red metal fins that serve as the primary heat-dissipating elements. The fins are enclosed within a rectangular frame, and there is a small, dark control or valve component located at the bottom center of the fin array. The radiator is slim in profile, projecting only a short distance from the wall, and has no visible decorative grille or cover beyond the exposed fins. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A tall, slim, wall-mounted radiator with vertical red metal fins set in a white rectangular panel. The design is modern and minimalist, with a small control or valve at the bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the white panel and the central vertical red fins, with a small control at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the radiator's slim profile and the protrusion of the red fin assembly from the white panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid white back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the red fin structure extending from the white panel.
attribute_pipe_connections: single connection at bottom center, downward orientation
